name: Deoxys Delta Speed Forme - Holon Phantoms

abilities.name: Form Change
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for another Deoxys and switch it with Deoxys.

attacks.name: Teleportation Burst
attacks.text: Switch Deoxys with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

tests.name: teleportation_burst_switches
tests.description: Test Teleportation Burst switches to bench
